typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-medium leading-none text-secondary
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium leading-tight text-secondary
typography.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-semibold text-text_secondary

surface_strategies.cards: bg-white border border-[#E8E4DF] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden

animations.scroll: lenis smooth scrolling for premium feel
animations.page_transition: Fade in with subtle slide up (y: 20 -> 0)

landing_hero.description: Aerial view of a resort on a tropical island. Use for the main Landing page background.

trip_card_1.description: Santorini sunset. Use for Destination cards or Recommendations.

trip_card_2.description: Tokyo city night. Use for Destination cards.

social_invite.description: Friends silhouette on mountain. Use for Invite section or Trip Workspace.

accommodation_1.description: Modern hotel room. Use for Accommodation Recommendations tab.

component_instructions.header: Always sticky with z-50. Use crystal glassmorphism (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80` or `#FDFBF7/80`). Avoid generic Vercel look.
component_instructions.buttons: Primary buttons: `bg-[#E07A5F] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 hover:bg-[#D26A4F] font-medium`. Secondary: `bg-white text-[#2A3B32] border border-[#E8E4DF] rounded-full hover:bg-[#F7F5F0]`.
component_instructions.inputs: Use Shadcn components but override borders to be soft. Add `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#81B29A] focus:border-transparent`. Use large padding `p-4`.
component_instructions.calendar: Shadcn calendar. Remove strict borders. Emphasize dates with `bg-[#81B29A]/20` for selected/available date ranges.
component_instructions.tabs: Override Shadcn tabs default underline. Use a pill-shaped indicator or soft background for the active tab (`bg-[#E8E4DF] rounded-full`).
component_instructions.bento_grid: For recommendations/features. Use Mode A 'Tetris' Grid. Asymmetrical spans. Ensure `h-full` and `object-cover` on all images within bento cells.

specific_pages.Landing: Hero section MUST be immersive. Full width/height image (`min-h-[85vh]`). A floating glassmorphism 'Booking/Search' bar should overlap the bottom center of the hero image. Typography should be huge (Cormorant Garamond).
specific_pages.Dashboard: Clean 'Control Room' layout but with generous spacing. Cards shouldn't look like standard admin cards; they should feel like photo albums or editorial highlights.
specific_pages.TripWorkspace: Split screen layout. Left: beautiful sticky summary of the trip with an image. Right: Scrollable action cards (Invite Friends, Fill Preferences).
specific_pages.PreferencesForm: Typeform-style interaction. One big question at a time or a long-scroll seamless form with massive typography. Avoid dense traditional inputs.
specific_pages.AvailabilityHeatmap: A functional visual treat. Use varying opacity of Accent color (`#81B29A`) to show guest availability density. It should look like an organic heatmap, not an Excel file.
specific_pages.Recommendations: Bento layout with high-quality images. Score rings should use Primary color. Clear tabs for Accommodations / Restaurants / Transport.
specific_pages.GuestAvailability: A public page. Must look incredibly welcoming. Big hero image of the destination. Simple, frictionless form.
specific_pages.DestinationDetail: Highly visual header. Horizontal scrollable tabs below. Clean list of options with high-contrast bold titles and soft descriptive text.
specific_pages.SlotPriceComparison: Use Recharts/Shadcn charts but styled cleanly. Remove grid lines, use soft bar colors (Accent for cheap, Primary for expensive).
specific_pages.FlightCoordination: Visualize synchronized arrivals with a timeline or map-like UI. Use a clean list grouped by time of day.

accessibility.contrast: Text over hero images MUST have a background overlay (`bg-black/40`) or subtle text-shadow to guarantee legibility. Check contrast for `#E07A5F` against white.
accessibility.interactive: All buttons, links, and forms MUST include `data-testid` (e.g., `data-testid='landing-hero-cta'`). Provide focus visible rings.
accessibility.motion: Respect `prefers-reduced-motion` for all Framer Motion and CSS transitions.
